title: Add auth to congress API endpoint

Everything is done. Here's a summary of what was changed:

**`/home/clungus/work/hello-world/serve.py`**

- Added `_is_authed(request_headers)` function that parses the `Cookie` header for `tauth_github=<user>` and validates against the allowed set (empty set = any authed user passes)
